BATTLECARD.Dialog.Title: Battlecard
BATTLECARD.Dialog.MultipleTargets: Multiple targets set — using the first.
BATTLECARD.Dialog.TargetMissing: Target is no longer on the scene — you can still proceed.
BATTLECARD.Notifications.PickTarget: Click a token to target it. Press Escape to cancel.
BATTLECARD.Notifications.InvalidD20: Enter the raw d20 face value (1–20).
BATTLECARD.Notifications.RollFailed: The roll could not be completed. See console for details.
BATTLECARD.Notifications.CardUpdateFaile: Could not update the attack card. See console for details.
BATTLECARD.Notifications.NoGMForUpdate: No active GM available to update the attack card.
BATTLECARD.Notifications.ResumeFailed: Cannot resume: the item or its attack activity no longer exists.
BATTLECARD.Notifications.WhisperNoTarget: Select at least one whisper recipient.
BATTLECARD.Settings.AutoClearTargets.Hin: Clear your targets automatically when an attack sequence ends with Done. Attack Again never clears.
BATTLECARD.Settings.BypassKey.Name: Bypass modifier key
BATTLECARD.Settings.BypassKey.Hint: Hold this key while using an item to skip Battlecard and use the default system flow.
BATTLECARD.Settings.DefaultRollMode.Name: Default roll mode
BATTLECARD.Settings.DefaultRollMode.Hint: Roll mode pre-selected when the dialog opens.
BATTLECARD.Settings.ReticleEnabled.Name: Target reticle enabled
BATTLECARD.Settings.ReticleEnabled.Hint: Show a pulsing ring on tokens you are targeting.
BATTLECARD.Settings.ReticleColor.Name: Reticle color
BATTLECARD.Settings.ReticleColor.Hint: Hex color of the pulsing target ring.
BATTLECARD.Settings.ReticleSpeed.Name: Reticle speed
BATTLECARD.Settings.ReticleSpeed.Hint: Speed and intensity of the pulse animation.
